articles.title: Beloved star dead one year after diagnosis
articles.description: One of France’s most celebrated actresses has died one year after a devastating diagnosis, prompting tributes from the French president and fellow stars.

articles.title: WWE Slammed for Ad-Heavy Broadcast During WrestleMania 42
articles.description: WWE is getting blasted by its fans for paying to watch WrestleMania 42 and still getting bombarded by commercials and ads.

articles.title: Next Big PS5 Exclusive Confirms Huge PS5 Pro Upgrade
articles.description: The next big PS5 exclusive game, which is set to release next month, has confirmed a huge PS5 Pro upgrade that looks poised to transform the game on the premium Sony console. articles.title: Cher, 79, is 'left speechless' as she 'discovers she has a 15-year-old granddaughter confirming years of family rumours her son Elijah Allman had a secret child'
articles.description: Kayti Edwards, the mother of the granddaughter, is said to have revealed the relation to the iconic singer last year during an emotional phone call.

articles.title: Ed Sheeran 'makes a staggering £5m per show on opening leg of his LOOP tour'
articles.description: Ed Sheeran's LOOP world tour got off to a flying start, raking in a staggering £5million per show during its opening leg.

articles.title: Invincible Season 4 Animation Error Sparks Debate Amongst Fans
articles.description: Like father, like son. Warning! Spoilers for Invincible on Prime Video follow. Fans of Prime Video’s Invincible have started debating the significance of animation errors after spotting a mistake in Season 4 that made Mark Grayson look a little too much like his dad, Omni-Man. articles.title: The First-Ever Superhero Is Coming To Live-Action To Show Marvel & DC How It's Done
articles.description: The first superhero ever created, the Phantom, is getting his own live-action series, and it'll finally show Marvel and DC how it's done.

articles.title: Sarah Ferguson considering 'multiple TV offers' as disgraced former Duchess of York hides away in luxury £2,000-a-night Austrian chalet
articles.description: She has been left humiliated by her ties to Jeffrey Epstein but Sarah Ferguson could find herself laughing all the way to the bank thanks to Hollywood.
